src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Add THEME option to MAIN_OPTION enum to support new theme selection feature.
Add ALL_WITH_BLUEPRINT_SETTINGS option to CONTENT_OPTION enum to support blueprint settings in content selection.
Configure Spring Boot application startup metrics with a buffer to capture performance data during initialization.
Remove the custom CORS interceptor registration and its associated imports, likely because CORS is now handled by Spring Security or a global filter in the target environment.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.human_impl: Deleted the `addInterceptors` method and imports for `LmsCorsInterceptor`, `HttpMethod`, `InterceptorRegistry`, `ArrayList`, and `List`.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Integrate custom REST security logging configuration into the HTTP security chain.
Explicitly enable CORS handling in the HTTP security configuration.
Apply a custom object post-processor to the authorization rules for enhanced security interception.
Configure Content Security Policy headers to restrict style sources and frame ancestors.
Set the Referrer-Policy header to SAME_ORIGIN to control referrer information leakage.
Remove the actuator path from the list of ignored web security paths, likely to secure or manage it differently.
Enforce OAuth2 security requirement globally in the OpenAPI definition to ensure all endpoints are protected.
Add a timezone configuration property to the ToolConfig class to support timezone-aware operations.
Add logic to expose blueprint course status to the view model when the course is an eligible destination.
Implement strict date validation for class dates using java.time API to prevent invalid date submissions.
Create a helper method using LocalDate and ResolverStyle.STRICT to validate date strings against a format.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.human_impl: public boolean isValid(String date, String dateFormat) { ... LocalDate.parse(date, ...); }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Refine the user-facing label for the 'ALL' content import option to be more specific.
Add support for a new content import option that includes Blueprint Course settings.
Extend the loading endpoint to also handle the /launch path for compatibility or new entry points.
Handle the new THEME step in the wizard navigation flow by redirecting to the theme intro page.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.human_impl: case THEME: return new ModelAndView("redirect:/app/theme/" + courseId + "/intro");

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Add Cross-Origin Resource Sharing support to the REST controller using a Spring Boot configuration property.
Inject PopupDismissalDateRepository to support new popup dismissal functionality.
Inject WizardService to support new wizard-related business logic.
Include dismissedOn field in the update logic for WizardUserCourse.
Include dismissedOn field in the creation logic for WizardUserCourse.
Update date format pattern to use the modern java.time API standard (uuuu for year) instead of legacy java.util.Date conventions.
Replace legacy null/empty string checks with the modern String.isBlank() method introduced in Java 11.
Add a 'notes' field to the PopupStatus model to support storing additional context or comments.
